basics.name: Alan Karp
basics.label: Enterprise Transformation & AI Operations Leader
basics.summary: Enterprise transformation and post-merger integration leader with 9+ years driving operational outcomes across PE-backed industrial platforms, manufacturing, and AI-enabled business systems. Core experience: ERP/MRP integration (SyteLine, SAP S/4HANA, QAD), enterprise reporting governance, CRM and MarTech enablement (Salesforce, Hybris, GA4), and program delivery across acquisitions totaling $800M+. Applied AI directly: deployed AI-assisted knowledge management in Confluence and built agentic automation systems through Syrup Labs AI. MBA, Villanova (Strategy, Analytics, AI/ML). B.S. Chemical Engineering, UMBC. APICS CSCP. Open to remote/hybrid Director or Sr. Manager roles in enterprise transformation, business operations, AI operations, or program leadership.

work.name: Syrup Labs AI
highlights: Designed and deployed AI concierge and intake systems for active clients including website assistants, event signup flows, and structured inquiry routing; clients gained first-ever lead tracking and automated follow-up.
Built parent/subagent architectures with prompt guardrails, FAQ handling, escalation logic, and intent separation between support and qualified lead triggers.
Implemented low-code automation pipelines using GoHighLevel, Google Sheets, Gmail, and website widgets to capture submissions and route qualified leads.
Created live pilot environments including hosted landing pages, QR-based event capture, and end-to-end demo environments.
Led full engagement lifecycle: discovery, scope, pricing, prompt iteration, testing, and phased rollout with ROI tied to admin time saved and lead capture volume.

work.name: DwyerOmega
highlights: Managed program execution for six acquisitions and consolidations valued at $800M+ into core ERP/MRP landscape, standardizing KPIs for repeatable integration.
Owned enterprise reporting governance and reconciliation across global orders, sales, pricing, quality, and inventory.
Oversaw 15-20 resource offshore vendor team including tasking, prioritization, and delivery tracking.
Served as Global Admin for Jira and Confluence; deployed AI-assisted knowledge management in Confluence.
Led greenfield implementation planning for AMS and Microsoft Fabric with external consulting partner.
Integrated Salesforce, Hybris, and GA4 with ERP, AMS, and Fabric enabling funnel visibility and pricing data.
Built repeatable data-forensics workflow using Power Query, DAX Studio, and KNIME.

work.name: DwyerOmega
highlights: Designed and executed $2M+ in automation and robotics-driven capital projects.
Reduced on-hand inventory by 75% through analytics and predictive planning.
Led Lean and continuous improvement initiatives including Kaizen events.
Built KPI dashboards for operations, engineering, and supply chain.

work.name: Copperweld
highlights: Managed 40+ employees across 14+ production lines in 24/7 environment.
Contributed to $3M+ annualized labor savings through workflow redesign and line balancing.

work.name: Selit North America
highlights: Spearheaded startup of $20M sister facility near Atlanta including full plant design and commissioning.
Day-to-day technical lead for 30+ FTE production team.

work.name: Toray Plastics
highlights: Increased line speeds by average 60 meters per hour generating $1M+ annualized revenue impact.
